summary: Status Change Notification feature fully tested. All 9 test scenarios passed. StatusChangeNotifier component correctly shows toast when user status changes, does NOT show toast on first visit (no previous status), does NOT repeat when status unchanged. Toast uses correct types (error for downward, success for upward) with proper durations (8s/6s). Sonner Toaster renders with dark theme at top-center. All regression tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: StatusChangeNotifier correctly fetches /api/position/{userId} and compares status with localStorage
localStorage key format 'philos_last_status_{userId}' is correct and user-specific
Toast only appears when: 1) previous status exists AND 2) status changed
Downward change (stable→atRisk): toast.error() with 8000ms duration - VERIFIED
First visit handling: no toast shown, localStorage updated - VERIFIED
No repeat: same status on reload = no toast - VERIFIED
Toast message for downward: contains 'dropped' and 'reduced visibility' - VERIFIED
Toaster positioned at top-center with dark theme and backdrop blur styling
StatusChangeNotifier is renderless (returns null) - correct pattern for side-effect components
Unique toast id='status-change' prevents duplicate toasts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Status Change Notification feature implemented in StatusChangeNotifier.js. Key implementation details: 1) Uses sonner toast library (import { toast } from 'sonner'). 2) Toaster component rendered in ProductApp.js with position='top-center' theme='dark'. 3) localStorage key format: 'philos_last_status_' + userId. 4) Status order: atRisk=0 < decaying=1 < stable=2 < rising=3. 5) To test status change: set localStorage to different status value, reload page. 6) Toast types: error (red, 8s) for downward, success (green, 6s) for upward. 7) No celebratory animations, simple subtle toast notification.
